name: Eclipse Twins
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蝕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エクリプス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
For this card's Xyz Summon, you can treat Rank 4 monsters you control as Level 4 monsters for material. You can detach 1 material from this card; this card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase this turn. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 2 other Rank 4 or lower Xyz Monsters in your GY; Special Summon 1 of them and attach the other to it as material. You can only use this effect of "Eclipse Twins" once per turn.

rel: Ryzeal<!-- confirmed by have been specifically designed for it by an official poster -->
action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
